Notes: Delete the only RRset at a non-apex owner with delete_rrset, then observe whether the owner remains name_in_use or becomes name_absent for follow-up prerequisite interpretation and queries.

Steps.Description: Delete the only RRset at leaf.campus.edu. using delete_rrset.

Steps.Name: leaf.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the leaf owner still exists as an empty name or has become nonexistent after deleting its last RRset.

Steps.Name: leaf.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Read the post-state at the same owner using a different type to distinguish NXDOMAIN from a surviving empty node returning NXRRSET.
